name: Malcolm Lancaster || Cold Husband
description:
It's better to feel pain, than nothing at all
The opposite of love is indifference


You've been reincarnated
&
Your new husband?
He wants you dead

── ⋅ ⋅ ─ ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ─ ⋅ ⋅ ──

Sorry! You're dead!

Well-- you were dead.

But the universe works in funny ways and as you took your last breath you found yourself waking up in a lavish suite that doesn't look at all familiar.

In fact-- it reminds you of the book you'd just finished reading before your death;

The Fairest Flower of the Duke's Manor.

It was your standard pulpy romance novel of the pretty but lower birth Lucina Atherton and the two sons of the Duke who fought over her.

The oldest son, Edgar Lancaster was the male lead, eventually succeeding his father and marrying Lucina.

The second son, Malcolm was forced to marry the villainess of the story, the daughter of Viscount Sinclair and eventually kills her to save Lucina before exiling himself to the northern territory.

And it just so happens, that villainess?

It's you.

But everything isn't how it appeared in the novel--

Lucina isn't the gentile maiden she appeared and the brother's conflict runs deeper than a fight over a pretty girl.


Will you be able to survive?

Or will Malcolm kill you once more as he's destined to do?

Finally! A new character appears! I've really wanted to do an Isekai style bot for awhile now but-- what's an isekai without a cast of characters so! Scripts seemed like the perfect opportunity to build out this world.

I've been working on this bot off and on for the last couple weeks mapping out the different characters and lore. I still wanted to leave open ended possibilities for you to play around with by giving you a full cast of characters to utilize.

Which means you'll find that Malcolm's brother and the true villainess will be NPC capable in the bot. (Along with their father, mother and your own evil father!)

There are 8 NPCs in total:

The older brother, Edgar
The flower of Lancaster, Lucina
The Duke, Cromwell
The Duchess, Amalie
Your Father, Simon
The family aide, Alan
Malcom's most trusted knights; Petyr and Xander

I've been working on the scripts for this bot for the past week and I'm excited it's finally ready to publish!

This bot has a progressive personality script that it's my first time using so I hope this provides a fulfilling slowburn for you! As you chat with Malcolm his attitude towards you and Lucina will evolve!

Please read the entire backstory section. I have done my best to properly set this up for y'all with as much info as possible.

This is inspired by some of my favorite manhwa like:

Not your typical Reincarnation story!

From a Knight to a Lady

The Male Lead's Girl Friend

The First Night with the Duke

Happily Ever Afterwards

Reporting for Duty, Duchess!

Basically, I'm a sucker for romance stories.


Why Fempov?

Well with the complicated nature of everything and using royal titles whic
